en.ahmedali: Why then do they turn away from the admonition
en.ahmedraza: So what is the matter with them that they turn away from the advice?
en.arberry: What ails them, that they turn away from the Reminder,
en.daryabadi: What aileth them, therefore, that they are from the Admonition turning away?
en.hilali: Then what is wrong with them (i.e. the disbelievers) that they turn away from (receiving) admonition?
en.itani: Why are they turning away from the Reminder?
en.maududi: What is the matter with people that they are turning away from this Exhortation,
en.mubarakpuri: Then what is wrong with them that they turn away from admonition
en.pickthall: Why now turn they away from the Admonishment,
en.qarai: What is the matter with them that they evade the Reminder
en.qaribullah: What is the matter with them that they turn away from this Reminder,
en.sahih: Then what is [the matter] with them that they are, from the reminder, turning away
en.sarwar: If such will be the Day of Judgment, what is the matter with them? Why do they run away from guidance,
en.shakir: What is then the matter with them, that they turn away from the admonition
en.wahiduddin: Then what is wrong with them that they turn away from admonition,
en.yusufali: Then what is the matter with them that they turn away from admonition?-
fa.ansarian: آنان را چه شده که از تذکر و هشدار روی گردانند؟
fa.ayati: چه شده است كه از اين پند اعراض مى‌كنند؟
fa.bahrampour: پس آنها را چه شده است كه از اين تذكار [قرآن‌] روى گردانند
fa.fooladvand: چرا آنها از تذكر روى گردانند؟!
fa.ghomshei: اینک چرا از یاد آن روز سخت خود (و از ذکر و اندرز قرآن) اعراض می‌کنند؟
fa.khorramdel: چرا باید ایشان، از قرآن رویگردان شوند؟ [[«التَّذْکِرَةِ»: پند و اندرز. یادآوری: در اینجا مراد قرآن است (نگا: المصحف‌المیسّر).]]
fa.khorramshahi: ایشان را چه می‌شود که از اندرز رویگردانند
fa.makarem: چرا آنها از تذکّر روی گردانند؟!
fa.moezzi: پس چه شودشان که از یاد آوردند روی گردانان‌
fa.mojtabavi: پس چيست آنها را كه از اين پند رويگردانند؟
fa.sadeqi: پس چیست برایشان (که) از یادواره رویگردانند؟!
